name: Super Flower Leadex III Gold 750W Fully Modular PCIe 5.0 Power Supply
highlights: Super Flower Leadex III Gold 750W 80+ Gold Full Modular Power Supply offers exceptional performance with 80+ Gold certification, ensuring up to 92% energy efficiency
This fully modular PSU is perfect for high-performance gaming PCs, with a silent 135mm fan and eco mode for quiet operation
Its advanced protections (OVP, OCP, SCP, and more) guarantee safe and reliable power delivery
Ideal for gaming builds and custom PCs, the Leadex III is compatible with powerful GPUs and CPUs, featuring 6 PCIe connectors, 9 SATA connectors, and a 3-year warranty
description: Super Flower Leadex III Gold 750W Fully Modular PCIe 5.0 Power Supply Price in Pakistan Specification Details Model Super Flower Leadex III Gold 750W Power Output 750W Efficiency Rating 80+ Gold (up to 92% efficiency) Form Factor ATX Modular Type Full Modular Fan Size 135mm Silent Hydraulic Bearing Fan Fan Mode Eco Mode (Zero RPM Fan at low loads) Dimensions 150mm (W) x 86mm (H) x 165mm (D) Input Voltage 100-240V AC Input Frequency Range 50-60Hz Input Current 10A Operating Temperature 0°C to 50°
